query:
SELECT id, name, email, openId, loginMethod, role, isPremium, createdAt 
FROM users 
WHERE openId = 'user_3EbVWbR4l4YyhQHiMTO3vvvafF5' 
   OR email = 'lesansemail@gmail.com'
ORDER BY id;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2NoQxNASu25QqFj.root --database frNnwU2pwLKJifDR8KqR7c --execute 
SELECT id, name, email, openId, loginMethod, role, isPremium, createdAt 
FROM users 
WHERE openId = 'user_3EbVWbR4l4YyhQHiMTO3vvvafF5' 
   OR email = 'lesansemail@gmail.com'
ORDER BY id;
